root.m_Talk_DEU: They're killing the C.O.s we released like they are nothing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They're killing the C.O.s we released like they are nothing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They could've been outstanding soldiers if they joined the Northern Army...
root.m_Talk_DEU: They could've been outstanding soldiers if they joined the Northern Army...
root.m_Talk_FRA: They could've been outstanding soldiers if they joined the Northern Army...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But in the end, they are all just test subjects.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But in the end, they are all just test subjects.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But in the end, they are all just test subjects.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Is Mavka ready?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Is Mavka ready?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Is Mavka ready?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. We will proceed as planned.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. We will proceed as planned.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. We will proceed as planned.
